messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0084",
  "title": "成本膨胀",
  "page_index": 47,
  "page_range": "47"
}

Section text:
成本膨胀
全球隐私法规持续收紧，对数据的 采集、存储与共享方式
提出更高限制。用户同意变得更难获取，而用户对 侵入式
广告的容忍度也在持续下降 。

message.content:
This section addresses the topic of cost inflation in data acquisition and digital advertising. It can answer retrieval queries regarding:
- Topics & Claims: How tightening global privacy regulations drive up operational costs; the increasing difficulty of obtaining user consent; and the declining consumer tolerance for intrusive advertising.
- Entities: Global privacy regulations, data collection/storage/sharing practices, user consent, intrusive advertising.
- Dates, Metrics, Tables, Figures, Procedures, Definitions, Evidence Types: Not specified in this excerpt.
The text functions as a high-level claim linking regulatory compliance burdens and shifting user preferences to rising data acquisition costs, suitable for questions on privacy law impacts, ad-tech cost drivers, and consumer consent challenges.

response_text:
This section addresses the topic of cost inflation in data acquisition and digital advertising. It can answer retrieval queries regarding:
- Topics & Claims: How tightening global privacy regulations drive up operational costs; the increasing difficulty of obtaining user consent; and the declining consumer tolerance for intrusive advertising.
- Entities: Global privacy regulations, data collection/storage/sharing practices, user consent, intrusive advertising.
- Dates, Metrics, Tables, Figures, Procedures, Definitions, Evidence Types: Not specified in this excerpt.
The text functions as a high-level claim linking regulatory compliance burdens and shifting user preferences to rising data acquisition costs, suitable for questions on privacy law impacts, ad-tech cost drivers, and consumer consent challenges.
